description_long: This is a single-seat couch with a bold animal print upholstery, featuring a pattern reminiscent of leopard or cheetah fur. The seat and backrest are covered in this animal print fabric, while the base and sides are finished in a dark, wood-like material. Three distinct, oval-shaped cushions with a textured, scale-like gray pattern are placed on the seat and armrests, providing both comfort and visual contrast. The armrests are wide and flat, matching the animal print upholstery, and the backrest is tall and rectangular. The legs are short and blocky, integrated into the wooden base, giving the couch a sturdy appearance. The overall design is striking and modern, suitable for an urban lounge or eclectic public space.
description: A bold, animal print single-seat couch with a dark wood base and three textured, gray oval cushions. The design is modern and visually striking, with wide armrests and a tall backrest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the animal print upholstery, three gray oval cushions, and wide armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dark wood back panel and a hint of the animal print at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the armrest and cushion arrangement from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, oval-shaped cushions are placed on the seat and armrests; no visible back cushion, and all cushions are accent pillows with a scale-like texture.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a bold, animal print pattern resembling leopard or cheetah fur, with irregular beige, brown, and black spots.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, blocky, and integrated into the dark wood base, mostly hidden from view.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are wide, flat, and fully upholstered in the animal print fabric, extending straight from the seat.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is tall, rectangular, continuous, and fully upholstered in the animal print fabric, with no visible tufting or division.
